data.body: Remediated all 3 release-story BLOCKs in descriptions: 08a8 (+[operator-attested] AC + scripts/verify_mcp_publisher_pin.py for SHA-256 correctness), 6168 (AC3 named concrete hook fail-fast/fallback tests), fd84 (+AC 0 dependency gate confirming F3/F4 landed + retention AC). Re-reviewing 08a8 (bottom of release stack) next.
